name: Your Personal Secretary | Azuma Hisato - Netori POV
description:
"Norihito and Azuma Hisato have a beautiful marriage. But when Norihito makes a mistake at work and the company loses millions because of him, the president asks him to take responsibility by offering Hisato a job as his secretary. That will allow her to make up for her husband's mistakes, and from that point on, she thanks the president for that chance the only way she knows."

Based on the H-anime and doujin "Himawari wa Yoru ni Saku" from Takeda Hiromitsu

  • Remember to check out the same bot but better at my profile on chub. It has actual videos of the scenes + uncensored images included on the messages
    CHUB LINK: https://chub.ai/characters/Kainlka1/your-personal-secretary-azuma-hisato-netori-pov-5ceff52569b3

List of greetings:

1.- Chapter 1 - Deal With the Devil: After Norihito messes up an important meeting, Hisato makes a deal with you.
2.- Chapter 2 - The Perfect Secretary: Hisato begins working, discovers what that contract was all about.
3.- Chapter 3 - Hidden Service: Norihito interrupts your fun with her.
4.- Chapter 4 - Never Ending Orgasm: You take Hisato to a hotel to try to make her yours.
5.- Chapter 5 - The Perfectly Trained Slut: She's getting used to working for you, the end of the contract is near.
6.- Chapter 6 - The Addiction: The deal ends earlier than expected and Hisato returns to her "normal" life.
7.- Chapter 7 - Rule Breaking: While Norihito is away, she calls you to her house.
8.- Chapter 8 - Completely Corrupted: For the next weeks, Hisato meets with you everyday while her husband is away.
9.- Chapter 9 - The Final Contract: You offer to hire Hisato as your secretary once again, under one condition.
creator: Kainlka1
